leading-5">MinIO AIStor</span> <span class="text-xs leading-4 text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400">Exascale data store for high-performance AI workloads, natively supporting the S3 API for objects, Iceberg for tables, and SFTP for files</span></a> <a href="https://docs.min.io/kms" class="flex flex-col gap-1 p-3 rounded-md no-underline text-gray-800 dark:text-slate-200 transition-colors leading-5">MinIO KMS</span> <span class="text-xs leading-4 text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400">Highly scalable key management server, for secure encryption at rest</span></a> <a href="https://docs.min.io/directpv" class="flex flex-col gap-1 p-3 rounded-md no-underline text-gray-800 dark:text-slate-200 transition-colors duration-150 hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-700 focus:outline focus:outline-2 focus:outline-theme-red focus:-outline-offset-2" role="menuitem"><span class="font-semibold text-sm leading-5">MinIO DirectPV</span> <span class="text-xs leading-4 text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400">Kubernetes CSI driver and volume manager for direct-attached storage</span></a> <a href="https://docs.min.io/warp" class="flex flex-col gap-1 p-3 rounded-md role="menuitem"><span class="font-semibold text-sm leading-5">MinIO Warp</span> <span class="text-xs leading-4 text-gray-500 dark:text-slate-400">S3-compatible object store benchmarking tool for measuring throughput and latency</span></a> <a href="https://docs.min.io/sidekick" class="flex flex-col gap-1 p-3 rounded-md no-underline text-gray-800 dark:text-slate-200 transition-colors <div class="flex flex-col min-w-0 flex-1 px-6 pt-7 pb-5">

<div class="flex-1">

# MinIO AIStor Documentation

<div class="text-shadow-landing xl:pr-48">

MinIO AIStor is an exascale AI data store that delivers enterprise performance, scale, agility, and economics for AI data, agentic computing, and analytics. AIStor natively supports the S3 API for objects, Iceberg for tables, and SFTP for files, and is licensed under the [MinIO Software License](https://docs.min.io/license/).

</div>

This site documents the installation, administration, and operations of AIStor Server clusters running the latest stable release.

<div class="my-8 grid pb-1 gap-4 grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3">
